DEFT'S OPPOSTION TO PEOPLE'S MOT TO DETAIN AND REQ ON OR FILED
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DAWF/EMMOD:EVEN THOUGH THE DEFENDANT IS ONHOME DETENTION, HE  MAY LEAVE HIS HOME ON WEDNESDAYS BETWEEN THE HOURS OF11AM TO 3PM FOR THE PURPOSE OF SEEKING EMPLOYMENT/

/CAL:MOTION FOR CONDITIONAL EXAMINATION/MO GRTD/X:THE CONDITIONAL EXAM ISTO BE HEARD CONCURRENT WITH THE PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWF/STWPX/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 04-20-21/

/CAL:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/MO DENIED/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WS/WEAP/SA2:THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (EXCEPT TO ATTEND COURT)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW60/LD:05-18-21/CONTD:MOTION FOR CONDITIONAL EXAMINATION/DOP/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: MICHAEL LINSCHEID/X: THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY FILES NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTON TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL,//FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 05-03-21 (30TH), 05-18-21 (60TH)/987,2/NB/X:WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL SIGNED AND FILED,/SAORD/SA2: KWOK GIN YEE, MALE, DOB: 05-10-53/SAORD3/SAORD2/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 03-22-21 AT 9AM IN DEPARTMENT 20/TE: 1 DAY/DAWF/CONTD: DA MOTION TO DETAIN/DOP/
